workflow.name: Start and Navigate to Wikipedia
workflow.description: Begin from a fresh tab and navigate to the Wikipedia homepage.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/
If the current URL is about:blank
If no page has been loaded yet
actions: Navigate to https://en.wikipedia.org/

workflow.name: Search for Bezier Curves
workflow.description: Once on the Wikipedia homepage, locate the search bar and enter 'Bezier curve'.
triggers: If the current URL contains en.wikipedia.org
If a search input with placeholder 'Search Wikipedia' is visible
actions: Type 'Bezier curve' into the search input with placeholder 'Search Wikipedia'
Press Enter

workflow.name: Scroll to End of Article
workflow.description: After navigating to the 'Bezier curve' article, scroll down to the very bottom of the page.
triggers: If the current URL contains en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bezier_curve
If a heading 'Bezier curve' is visible
actions: Scroll to the end of the page

workflow.name: Article Scrolled to End
workflow.description: Confirm that the 'Bezier curve' article has been fully loaded and scrolled to its conclusion.
triggers: If the current URL contains en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bezier_curve
If the page has scrolled to the very bottom
actions: Terminate: Successfully scrolled to the end of the Bezier curve article.

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/
If the current URL is about:blank
If the current URL starts with data:
If no page has been loaded yet
actions: Navigate to https://en.wikipedia.org/

workflow.name: On Wikipedia Homepage
workflow.description: Search for 'bezier curves' on the Wikipedia homepage.
triggers: If the current URL contains en.wikipedia.org
If a search input with placeholder 'Search Wikipedia' is visible
actions: Type 'bezier curves' into the search input with placeholder 'Search Wikipedia'
Press Enter

workflow.name: On Search Results or Article Page
workflow.description: Handle navigation from search, either directly to the article or via a search results page.
triggers: If the current URL contains en.wikipedia.org/wiki/B%C3%A9zier_curve
If the current URL contains en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:Search
If a heading with text 'Bézier curve' is visible
actions: If the current URL contains en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:Search, click the link with text 'Bézier curve'

workflow.name: On Bezier Curve Article Page
workflow.description: Confirm the Bezier curve article is loaded and scroll to the bottom.
triggers: If the current URL contains en.wikipedia.org/wiki/B%C3%A9zier_curve
If a heading with text 'Bézier curve' is visible
actions: Scroll to the bottom of the page

workflow.name: Article Scrolled to End
workflow.description: The Bezier curve article has been scrolled to its end.
triggers: If the current URL contains en.wikipedia.org/wiki/B%C3%A9zier_curve
If the scroll position is at the very bottom of the page
actions: Terminate: Successfully scrolled to the end of the Bezier curve article.
workflow.end_state: Task complete: Scrolled to end of article.

state_names: On Search Results or Article Page

sentence: go to saucedemo.com, log in with username standard_user and password secret_sauce, add the Sauce Labs Backpack and the Sauce Labs Bike Light to the cart, open the shopping cart, click checkout, enter first name Test, last name User, postal code 12345, continue, and then finish the order

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab. The starting page is not guaranteed, so this state's triggers stay deliberately broad -- if none of them match, the whole workflow dead-ends here.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/
If the current URL is about:blank
If the current URL starts with data:
If no page has been loaded yet
actions: Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/

workflow.name: On Login Page
workflow.description: Recognize the login page and enter the provided credentials.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com
If an input with placeholder 'Username' is visible
actions: Type 'standard_user' into the input with placeholder 'Username'
Type 'secret_sauce' into the input with placeholder 'Password'
Click the button with text 'Login'

workflow.name: On Products Page
workflow.description: After successful login, add the specified items to the cart and then navigate to the cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/inventory.html
If an element with text 'Products' is visible
actions: Click the button with text 'Add to cart' for the item 'Sauce Labs Backpack'
Click the button with text 'Add to cart' for the item 'Sauce Labs Bike Light'
Click the shopping cart icon

workflow.name: On Cart Page
workflow.description: Verify the items are in the cart and proceed to checkout.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/cart.html
If an element with text 'Your Cart' is visible
actions: Click the button with text 'Checkout'

workflow.name: On Checkout Information Page
workflow.description: Enter the required shipping information.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/checkout-step-one.html
If an input with placeholder 'First Name' is visible
actions: Type 'Test' into the input with placeholder 'First Name'
Type 'User' into the input with placeholder 'Last Name'
Type '12345' into the input with placeholder 'Zip/Postal Code'
Click the button with text 'Continue'

workflow.name: On Checkout Overview Page
workflow.description: Review the order details and finalize the purchase.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/checkout-step-two.html
If an element with text 'Checkout: Overview' is visible
actions: Click the button with text 'Finish'

workflow.name: On Checkout Complete Page
workflow.description: Confirm that the order has been successfully placed.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/checkout-complete.html
If an element with text 'Checkout: Complete!' is visible
actions: Terminate: Order placed successfully

sentence: go to saucedemo.com, log in with username standard_user and password secret_sauce, add the Sauce Labs Backpack and the Sauce Labs Bike Light to the cart, open the shopping cart, click checkout, enter first name Test, last name User, postal code 12345, continue, and then finish the order

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab. The starting page is not guaranteed, so this state's triggers stay deliberately broad -- if none of them match, the whole workflow dead-ends here.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/
If the current URL is about:blank
If the current URL starts with data:
If no page has been loaded yet
actions: Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/

workflow.name: On Login Page
workflow.description: Log in to SauceDemo with the provided credentials.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com
If an input field with placeholder 'Username' is visible
If a button with text 'Login' is visible
actions: Type 'standard_user' into the input with placeholder 'Username'
Type 'secret_sauce' into the input with placeholder 'Password'
Click the button with text 'Login'

workflow.name: On Products Page (Adding Items)
workflow.description: Add the specified items to the shopping cart and then open the cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/inventory.html
If the text 'Products' is visible
actions: Click the button with text 'Add to cart' next to the item 'Sauce Labs Backpack'
Click the button with text 'Add to cart' next to the item 'Sauce Labs Bike Light'
Click the shopping cart icon

workflow.name: On Your Cart Page
workflow.description: Proceed to checkout from the shopping cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/cart.html
If the text 'Your Cart' is visible
actions: Click the button with text 'Checkout'

workflow.name: On Checkout Step One Page
workflow.description: Enter the required shipping information.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/checkout-step-one.html
If the text 'Checkout: Your Information' is visible
actions: Type 'Test' into the input with placeholder 'First Name'
Type 'User' into the input with placeholder 'Last Name'
Type '12345' into the input with placeholder 'Zip/Postal Code'
Click the button with text 'Continue'

workflow.name: On Checkout Step Two Page
workflow.description: Confirm the order details and complete the purchase.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/checkout-step-two.html
If the text 'Checkout: Overview' is visible
actions: Click the button with text 'Finish'

workflow.name: On Checkout Complete Page
workflow.description: Verify that the order has been successfully completed.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/checkout-complete.html
If the text 'Checkout: Complete!' is visible
actions: Terminate: order completed

sentence: go to saucedemo.com, log in with username standard_user and password secret_sauce, sort the products by price from low to high, add the two cheapest products to the cart, open the cart, remove one of them, and confirm exactly one item remains

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab. The starting page is not guaranteed, so this state's triggers stay deliberately broad -- if none of them match, the whole workflow dead-ends here.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/
If the current URL is about:blank
If the current URL starts with data:
If no page has been loaded yet
actions: Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/

workflow.name: On Login Page
workflow.description: Log in to the Sauce Demo website using the provided credentials.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com
If an input field with placeholder 'Username' is visible
If a button with text 'Login' is visible
actions: Type 'standard_user' into the input field with placeholder 'Username'
Type 'secret_sauce' into the input field with placeholder 'Password'
Click the button with text 'Login'

workflow.name: On Products Page - Sort Items
workflow.description: After logging in, sort the products by price from low to high.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/inventory.html
If a div with text 'Products' is visible
If a select element with class 'product_sort_container' is visible
actions: Select 'Price (low to high)' from the dropdown with class 'product_sort_container'

workflow.name: Products Sorted - Add Two Cheapest to Cart
workflow.description: With products sorted, add the first two (cheapest) items to the cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/inventory.html
If the selected option in the dropdown with class 'product_sort_container' is 'Price (low to high)'
If at least two buttons with text 'Add to cart' are visible
actions: Click the first button with text 'Add to cart'
Click the second button with text 'Add to cart'

workflow.name: Items Added - Go to Cart
workflow.description: Navigate to the shopping cart page after adding items.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/inventory.html
If a span with class 'shopping_cart_badge' and text '2' is visible
actions: Click the element with class 'shopping_cart_link'

workflow.name: On Cart Page - Remove One Item
workflow.description: On the cart page, remove one of the two items.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/cart.html
If a div with text 'Your Cart' is visible
If two buttons with text 'Remove' are visible
actions: Click the first button with text 'Remove'

workflow.name: Item Removed - Confirm One Item Remains
workflow.description: Verify that exactly one item remains in the cart after removal.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/cart.html
If a div with text 'Your Cart' is visible
If exactly one button with text 'Remove' is visible
actions: Terminate: Exactly one item remains in the cart.
workflow.end_state: Exactly one item remains in the cart.

state_names: Products Sorted - Add Two Cheapest to Cart
On Cart Page - Remove One Item
Item Removed - Confirm One Item Remains

sentence: go to saucedemo.com, log in with username standard_user and password secret_sauce, sort the products by price from low to high, add the two cheapest products to the cart, open the cart, remove one of them, and confirm exactly one item remains

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab. The starting page is not guaranteed, so this state's triggers stay deliberately broad -- if none of them match, the whole workflow dead-ends here.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/
If the current URL is about:blank
If the current URL starts with data:
If no page has been loaded yet
actions: Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/

workflow.name: On Login Page
workflow.description: Log in to Sauce Labs Demo with the provided credentials.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com
If an input field with placeholder 'Username' is visible
actions: Type 'standard_user' into the input field with placeholder 'Username'
Type 'secret_sauce' into the input field with placeholder 'Password'
Click the button with text 'Login'

workflow.name: On Products Page
workflow.description: Sort the products by price from low to high.
triggers: If the current URL contains inventory.html
If a dropdown with class 'product_sort_container' is visible
actions: Click the dropdown with class 'product_sort_container'
Select option 'Price (low to high)' from the dropdown

workflow.name: Products Sorted and Ready to Add
workflow.description: Add the two cheapest products (the first two after sorting) to the cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains inventory.html
If the dropdown with class 'product_sort_container' has selected value 'Price (low to high)'
If at least two buttons with text 'Add to cart' are visible
actions: Click the first button with text 'Add to cart'
Click the second button with text 'Add to cart'

workflow.name: Products Added, Open Cart
workflow.description: Open the shopping cart to proceed with the order.
triggers: If the current URL contains inventory.html
If the shopping cart icon shows a badge with '2'
actions: Click the shopping cart icon

workflow.name: On Cart Page
workflow.description: Remove one of the items from the cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains cart.html
If at least two elements with class 'cart_item' are visible
actions: Click the first button with text 'Remove'

workflow.name: Cart Confirmed
workflow.description: Confirm that exactly one item remains in the cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains cart.html
If exactly one element with class 'cart_item' is visible
actions: Terminate: Exactly one item remains in the cart.
workflow.end_state: Exactly one item remains in the cart

state_names: Products Sorted and Ready to Add

sentence: go to the-internet.herokuapp.com/login, log in with username tomsmith and password SuperSecretPassword!, click Logout, then go to the-internet.herokuapp.com/dynamic_controls, click the Enable button, wait for the input field to become enabled, and type hello into it

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start the process from a fresh browser tab or a general page. The starting page is not guaranteed, so this state's triggers stay deliberately broad.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/
If the current URL is about:blank
If the current URL starts with data:
If no page has been loaded yet
actions: Navigate to https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login

workflow.name: On Login Page
workflow.description: Log in with the provided credentials.
triggers: If the current URL contains /login
If text 'Login Page' is visible
actions: Type 'tomsmith' into text field with id 'username'
Type 'SuperSecretPassword!' into password field with id 'password'
Click button with text 'Login'

workflow.name: On Secure Area Page
workflow.description: After successful login, click the 'Logout' button.
triggers: If the current URL contains /secure
If text 'Secure Area' is visible
If a button with text 'Logout' is visible
actions: Click button with text 'Logout'

workflow.name: After Logout, Navigating to Dynamic Controls
workflow.description: After logging out, navigate to the dynamic controls page.
triggers: If the current URL contains the-internet.herokuapp.com
If the current URL does NOT contain /secure
actions: Navigate to https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/dynamic_controls

workflow.name: On Dynamic Controls Page - Before Enabling
workflow.description: On the dynamic controls page, click the 'Enable' button.
triggers: If the current URL contains /dynamic_controls
If a button with text 'Enable' is visible
actions: Click button with text 'Enable'

workflow.name: Waiting For Input Field To Enable
workflow.description: Wait for the input field to become enabled after clicking 'Enable'. This state has no actions and will simply wait until the next state's triggers match.
triggers: If the current URL contains /dynamic_controls
If a button with text 'Disable' is visible
If the input field with id 'text' is disabled

workflow.name: Input Field Enabled and Typing
workflow.description: Once the input field is enabled, type 'hello' into it.
triggers: If the current URL contains /dynamic_controls
If a button with text 'Disable' is visible
If the input field with id 'text' is enabled
actions: Type 'hello' into text field with id 'text'
workflow.end_state: Successfully logged in, logged out, navigated to dynamic controls, enabled input, and typed 'hello'.

state_names: After Logout, Navigating to Dynamic Controls
On Dynamic Controls Page - Before Enabling
Waiting For Input Field To Enable
states_with_no_actions: Waiting For Input Field To Enable

lint_issues.state: Waiting For Input Field To Enable
lint_issues.message: Empty actions with a wait/verification-sounding name -- looks like an intentional 'sit here until something external changes' state. Confirm that's what you meant.
Last state's actions don't mention 'Terminate'. NetGent's web agent needs an explicit terminate instruction to stop cleanly.

sentence: go to automationexercise.com, search for 'dress', add the first two products in the results to your cart, view the cart, and confirm both products are listed

workflow.name: On Browser Home Page
workflow.description: Start from a fresh tab and navigate to the Automation Exercise website.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/
If the current URL is about:blank
If the current URL starts with data:
If no page has been loaded yet
actions: Navigate to https://automationexercise.com/

workflow.name: On Automation Exercise Homepage
workflow.description: Locate the search input and perform the search for 'dress'.
triggers: If the current URL contains automationexercise.com
If an input field with placeholder 'Search' is visible
actions: Type 'dress' into the input field with placeholder 'Search'
Click the button with text 'Search'

workflow.name: On Search Results Page - Add First Product
workflow.description: Add the first product from the search results to the cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains /products
If the text 'SEARCHED PRODUCTS' is visible
actions: Hover over the first product card in the results
Click the 'Add to cart' button associated with the first product

workflow.name: Product Added Modal - Continue Shopping
workflow.description: After adding the first product, close the 'Product Added!' modal to add the second product.
triggers: If a modal with text 'Product Added!' is visible
If a button with text 'Continue Shopping' is visible
actions: Click the button with text 'Continue Shopping'

workflow.name: On Search Results Page - Add Second Product
workflow.description: Add the second product from the search results to the cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains /products
If the text 'SEARCHED PRODUCTS' is visible
actions: Hover over the second product card in the results
Click the 'Add to cart' button associated with the second product

workflow.name: Product Added Modal - View Cart
workflow.description: After adding the second product, click 'View Cart' to proceed to the cart page.
triggers: If a modal with text 'Product Added!' is visible
If a button with text 'View Cart' is visible
actions: Click the button with text 'View Cart'

workflow.name: On Cart Page - Confirm Products
workflow.description: Verify that both added products are listed in the shopping cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains /view_cart
If the text 'Shopping Cart' is visible
actions: Verify that at least two distinct product items are visible in the cart table

state_names: On Search Results Page - Add First Product
On Search Results Page - Add Second Product

lint_issues.message: Last state's actions don't mention 'Terminate'. NetGent's web agent needs an explicit terminate instruction to stop cleanly.

sentence: go to automationexercise.com, search for 'dress', add the first two products in the results to your cart, view the cart, and confirm both products are listed

workflow.name: Start Browsing
workflow.description: Start from a fresh browser tab and navigate to automationexercise.com.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/
If the current URL is about:blank
If the current URL starts with data:
If no page has been loaded yet
actions: Navigate to https://automationexercise.com/

workflow.name: Search for Product
workflow.description: On the Automation Exercise homepage, locate the search input and search for 'dress'.
triggers: If the current URL contains automationexercise.com
If a search input with placeholder 'Search Products' is visible
actions: Type 'dress' into the input field with placeholder 'Search Products'
Click the button with icon 'fa fa-search'

workflow.name: Add First Two Products to Cart
workflow.description: On the search results page, add the first two products to the cart and handle the 'Continue Shopping' / 'View Cart' prompts.
triggers: If the current URL contains automationexercise.com/products
If a heading 'ALL PRODUCTS' is visible
actions: Hover over the first product card in the list
Click the 'Add to cart' button for the first product
Wait for a modal to appear with text 'Your product has been added to cart.'
Click the button with text 'Continue Shopping'
Hover over the second product card in the list
Click the 'Add to cart' button for the second product
Wait for a modal to appear with text 'Your product has been added to cart.'
Click the button with text 'View Cart'

workflow.name: Verify Cart Contents
workflow.description: On the cart page, confirm that both 'dress' products are listed.
triggers: If the current URL contains automationexercise.com/view_cart
If a heading 'Shopping Cart' is visible
actions: Verify that the text 'Dress' appears at least twice within the cart item names
Verify that at least two distinct product rows are visible in the cart table

state_names: Add First Two Products to Cart

lint_issues.message: Last state's actions don't mention 'Terminate'. NetGent's web agent needs an explicit terminate instruction to stop cleanly.

actions: Click the button with text 'Add to cart'
Click the button with text 'Back to products'

workflow.name: Back On Products Page After Adding Item
workflow.description: Now that the item is in the cart, open the shopping cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/inventory.html
If a shopping cart icon with a badge indicating items is visible
actions: Click the shopping cart icon

workflow.name: On Shopping Cart Page
workflow.description: Proceed to checkout from the shopping cart.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/cart.html
If an element with text 'Your Cart' is visible
actions: Click the button with text 'Checkout'

workflow.name: On Checkout Step One Page
workflow.description: Fill in the required personal information for checkout.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/checkout-step-one.html
If an input field with placeholder 'First Name' is visible
actions: Type 'Test' into the input with placeholder 'First Name'
Type 'User' into the input with placeholder 'Last Name'
Type '12345' into the input with placeholder 'Zip/Postal Code'
Click the button with text 'Continue'

workflow.name: On Checkout Step Two Page
workflow.description: Confirm that the checkout details have been filled and the next step is reached.
triggers: If the current URL contains saucedemo.com/checkout-step-two.html
If an element with text 'Checkout: Overview' is visible
actions: Terminate: Checkout details filled

state_names: On Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket Product Page
Back On Products Page After Adding Item
